text:

Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨💥 Danny Röhl to RB Salzburg - DONE DEAL ✔️

Full agreement reached with #RangersFC. 37 y/o Röhl signs as new RB Salzburg head coach. Return to Red Bull group completed. 

Fee between €1-2m, including bonuses. Surprising exclusive news from Thursday, set to be official soon. @SkySportDE 🇩🇪
